commencement.label: Commencement
commencement.why: Confirms the job has started under the correct application/notice and lets building control agree inspection expectations.

foundation_excavation.label: Foundation excavation
foundation_excavation.why: Allows soil, depth, width, tree influence and bearing conditions to be checked before concrete is poured.

foundation_concrete.label: Foundation concrete
foundation_concrete.why: Confirms concrete placement and dimensions before the work is hidden.

oversite_dpc.label: Oversite / damp-proof course
oversite_dpc.why: Checks damp protection, floor make-up and early moisture-control details.

drainage_before_cover.label: Drainage before cover
drainage_before_cover.why: Drains are easiest to correct before trenches and floors are closed up.

structural_steel.label: Structural beams and supports
structural_steel.why: Beam size, bearings, padstones, restraint and fire protection can be checked before concealment.

fire_protection.label: Fire protection before cover
fire_protection.why: Important for lofts, open-plan layouts, steels, protected routes and separating elements.

insulation_before_cover.label: Insulation before cover
insulation_before_cover.why: Thermal elements cannot be verified properly once plasterboard, flooring or roof coverings are complete.

ventilation_services.label: Ventilation and services
ventilation_services.why: Extract routes, terminals, notifiable electrics, gas/flue routes and hot water safety can be evidenced before completion.

completion.label: Final completion
completion.why: The final check supports the completion certificate. Missing evidence at this point can delay sign-off.
